title: 10 Things the Phone Is Stealing From a Man of God
caption:
Every time you reach for it first, something walks out the door.

The first thought of the morning. His ability to sit with discomfort. His prayer life — you can't hear a quiet voice over 200 notifications a day. The conversation he was made to be fully present for. His sleep.

His sense of what enough looks like. His creative thinking. The habit of waiting on God — boredom used to be where men met God; now it's where they reach for the phone. His attention, the only thing he can never get back.

And the man he was becoming. Scroll long enough and the formation stops. God forms a man in the quiet.

This isn't an argument for going off-grid. It's a question: what are you trading, and is it worth it?

Save this for when the scroll starts to feel like the default.

#faith #christianmen #phone #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #prayer #christianity #focus
